name: factume
description: > Tu parles, on facture. L'IA transcrit, structure, génère un PDF conforme e-invoicing 2026.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,EXPO" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix factume-backend" "cross-env EXPO_NO_DOCTOR=1 npm start --prefix factume"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix factume-backend && npm install --prefix factume
